creator: chris@imagemetrica.com
text:
Redmine fails to load. I have reinstalled Ruby, rubygem and associated packages and still the problem persists. I've not had a working Redmine system since the problems first began in September 2011, so would really appreciate some help here. Thanks.

These are the relevant Ruby ports that I am using:

redmine-1.2.1_1
ruby+nopthreads-1.8.7.352_2,1
ruby18-bdb-0.6.6
ruby18-gems-1.8.11
ruby18-iconv-1.8.7.352,1
ruby18-mysql-2.8.2_1
ruby18-rmagick-2.13.1_2
rubygem-daemons-1.1.4
rubygem-eventmachine-0.12.10
rubygem-i18n-0.6.0,2
rubygem-rack-1.3.5,3
rubygem-rake-0.9.2.2
rubygem-thin-1.2.11
